rules.name: Idle Virtual Machine
rules.description: VM CPU < {cpu_idle_pct}% average over 7 days. Deallocate or delete.

rules.name: Oversized Virtual Machine
rules.description: VM CPU < {cpu_oversize_pct}% and memory < {mem_idle_pct}%. Downsize SKU.

rules.name: Spot VM Opportunity
rules.description: Batch/dev/test workloads on on-demand VMs. Spot pricing saves up to 90%.

rules.name: Stopped (Not Deallocated) VM
rules.description: VM is stopped but still incurring compute charges. Deallocate it.

rules.name: VM Without Reserved Instance
rules.description: Running VM with no reservation. 1-yr RI saves ~40%, 3-yr ~60%.

rules.name: Extended VM Underutilization
rules.description: VM sustained low CPU and memory over evaluation window with sufficient cost to justify action.

rules.name: VM Family Right-Sizing
rules.description: Suggest smaller VM family or burstable family when workload shape is consistently low.

rules.name: Old Disk Snapshot (>90 days)
rules.description: Snapshots older than 90 days accumulate cost. Review and delete.

rules.name: Oversized Disk (Premium → Standard)
rules.description: Premium SSD disk on a stopped/idle VM. Downgrade to Standard SSD.

rules.name: Unattached Managed Disk
rules.description: Managed disk not attached to any VM. Delete or snapshot-then-delete.

rules.name: Extended Snapshot Retention
rules.description: Old snapshots should be removed or moved to a governed retention set.

rules.name: Extended Unused Disk Detection
rules.description: Disk is unattached long enough to be considered waste.

rules.name: Empty App Service Plan
rules.description: App Service Plan with no hosted apps. Delete or consolidate workloads.

rules.name: Over-Provisioned App Service Plan
rules.description: Premium/isolated plan hosting few apps. Downgrade SKU or consolidate apps.

rules.name: Extended App Service Plan Waste
rules.description: Empty or over-provisioned App Service Plans create recurring platform cost.

rules.name: AKS Cluster on Old Kubernetes Version
rules.description: Cluster is not on a supported N or N-1 version. Upgrade for security + cost efficiency.

rules.name: Cluster Autoscaler Disabled
rules.description: No autoscaler = permanently over-provisioned nodes. Enable cluster autoscaler.

rules.name: Dev/Staging Cluster Running Outside Business Hours
rules.description: Non-prod cluster running 24/7. Enable start-stop schedule ({cluster_dev_hours}).

rules.name: Idle AKS Node
rules.description: Node CPU < {node_cpu_idle}% and mem < {node_mem_idle}%. Enable cluster autoscaler.

rules.name: Node Pool Not Using Spot VMs
rules.description: System node pool is fine on on-demand. User/batch pools can use Spot (up to 90% savings).

rules.name: Over-Provisioned Node Pool
rules.description: Node count consistently above actual scheduling needs. Reduce max nodes.

rules.name: Single Node Pool Architecture
rules.description: All workloads on one pool. Split system vs user pools for cost + resilience.

rules.name: AKS Non-Prod Scheduling
rules.description: Non-production clusters should use shutdown schedules or scale-to-zero patterns where possible.

rules.name: AKS System Pool Reliability Baseline
rules.description: Production system pools should maintain minimum healthy node count for reliability.

rules.name: Extended AKS Idle Pool Detection
rules.description: Node pool has too many idle nodes relative to total pool size.

rules.name: Hot Storage Account — Low Activity
rules.description: Storage account on Hot tier with no transactions > {storage_days_unused} days. Move to Cool/Archive.

rules.name: LRS Replication on Critical Data
rules.description: Storage using Locally Redundant Storage. Consider GRS/ZRS for resilience (cost tradeoff).

rules.name: No Blob Lifecycle Policy
rules.description: Storage account missing lifecycle management. Add tiering rules to auto-move cold data.

rules.name: Storage Lifecycle Candidate
rules.description: Storage accounts without lifecycle management should be reviewed for tiering and archival.

rules.name: Unassociated Public IP Address
rules.description: Static Public IP not associated with any resource. Incurring idle charges. Delete it.

rules.name: Extended Public IP Idle Detection
rules.description: Unassociated static public IPs create direct monthly waste.

rules.name: Unattached Network Interface
rules.description: NIC not attached to a VM or other resource. Delete after confirming no dependency.

rules.name: Orphaned Network Interface
rules.description: NICs detached from VMs still incur minor management overhead and clutter inventory.

rules.name: Idle NAT Gateway
rules.description: NAT Gateway with no associated subnets. Costs ~$32+/mo idle. Delete or attach subnets.

rules.name: Extended Idle NAT Gateway
rules.description: NAT Gateway without subnet associations is pure idle spend.

rules.name: Load Balancer With Empty Backend Pool
rules.description: Load Balancer has no backend instances. Idle Standard LB costs ~$18/mo. Delete it.

rules.name: Extended Idle Load Balancer Detection
rules.description: Load balancers without backend instances create avoidable network spend.

rules.name: Application Gateway With No Listeners
rules.description: Application Gateway has no active listeners. Costs ~$125+/mo idle. Delete or consolidate.

rules.name: Extended Idle Application Gateway Detection
rules.description: Application gateways without listeners should be deleted or reconfigured.

rules.name: Idle SQL Database
rules.description: SQL DB DTU/vCore utilization < {db_dtu_idle_pct}% for 7 days. Pause (serverless) or delete.

rules.name: SQL DB Not Using Serverless Tier
rules.description: Dev/test SQL databases on provisioned compute. Switch to Serverless for auto-pause savings.

rules.name: SQL Serverless Candidate
rules.description: Low-utilization SQL databases should move to serverless when supported.

rules.name: Cosmos DB on Provisioned Throughput
rules.description: Low-traffic Cosmos DB using provisioned RU/s. Switch to autoscale or serverless.

rules.name: Cosmos Autoscale Candidate
rules.description: Low steady utilization suggests autoscale or serverless is cheaper than provisioned throughput.

rules.name: Failed Redis Cache
rules.description: Azure Cache for Redis in Failed provisioning state. Delete and recreate or open support ticket.

rules.name: Oversized Redis Cache
rules.description: Premium Redis tier may exceed workload needs. Review SKU and shard count.

rules.name: Redis Health and Recovery
rules.description: Failed Redis caches should be remediated immediately.

rules.name: Redis Right-Sizing Candidate
rules.description: Premium or high-capacity Redis SKUs should be validated against actual memory pressure.

rules.name: Key Vault Soft Delete Disabled
rules.description: Key Vault without soft delete or purge protection. Accidental deletion is irrecoverable.

rules.name: Key Vault Protection Baseline
rules.description: Key Vault should have soft delete and purge protection enabled for recoverability.

rules.name: Approaching Budget Limit
rules.description: Subscription spend at {budget_warn_pct}%+ of configured budget.

rules.name: Budget Limit Nearly Exceeded
rules.description: Subscription spend at {budget_crit_pct}%+ of configured budget. Immediate action required.

rules.name: Budget Guardrail Breach Risk
rules.description: Budget current or forecast spend is approaching the configured limit.

rules.name: Azure Savings Plan Opportunity
rules.description: Stable compute spend. Azure Savings Plan offers up to 65% discount across any VM family.

rules.name: Reserved Instance Opportunity
rules.description: Consistent VM usage detected. 1-yr RI saves ~40%, 3-yr ~60% vs pay-as-you-go.

rules.name: Reserved Instance or Savings Plan Candidate
rules.description: Stable-running VMs are candidates for Reservations or Savings Plans.

rules.name: Missing Governance Tags
rules.description: Resource is missing required ownership, environment, or cost allocation tags.
